summary: Tested Weekly Admin Analytics Digest feature. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED. Frontend: All features verified - Preview Digest button opens modal with correct content, Send Digest Now button works and shows success toast, all 3 action buttons visible. Non-admin users correctly blocked with Access Denied.

issues: Console warnings about recharts chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/analytics-digest/preview requires authentication (401/403)
GET /api/admin/analytics-digest/preview requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
GET /api/admin/analytics-digest/preview returns HTML and data object for admin
Preview HTML contains MRR section
Preview HTML contains Conversion section
Preview HTML contains Churn section
Preview HTML contains New Signups section with sparkline
Preview HTML contains User Funnel section
Preview HTML contains Tier Breakdown section
Preview data contains all required fields (new_signups, total_users, active_trials, etc.)
Preview data MRR is numeric and non-negative
Preview data ARR equals 12x MRR
Preview data daily_signups has 7 days with day/count fields
POST /api/admin/analytics-digest/send requires authentication (401/403)
POST /api/admin/analytics-digest/send requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
POST /api/admin/analytics-digest/send works for admin (returns success: true)
Send endpoint returns sent count (integer)
Send endpoint returns data_summary with mrr, new_signups, conversion_rate, churn_rate
Preview and send use consistent analytics data
Analytics tab visible in admin panel (data-testid='admin-tab-analytics')
subscription-analytics container present (data-testid='subscription-analytics')
Refresh Analytics button visible and working (data-testid='refresh-analytics')
Preview Digest button visible (data-testid='preview-digest')
Send Digest Now button visible (data-testid='send-digest')
Preview modal opens with Weekly Analytics Digest Preview title
Preview modal shows MRR, Conversion, Churn KPIs
Preview modal shows New Signups with sparkline
Preview modal shows User Funnel (Active Trials, Active Subscribers, Expired, Churned)
Preview modal shows Tier Breakdown table
Send Digest Now shows success toast 'Digest sent to 1 admin(s)'
Non-admin user sees Access Denied when accessing /admin/analytics
6 KPI cards present: MRR, Trial Conversion, Churn Rate, Active Trials, Active Subs, Pending Reviews
critical_code_review_comments: Admin analytics digest correctly integrated in weekly_digest_scheduler to auto-fire on Mondays
Preview endpoint returns {html, data} as expected - HTML contains all required sections
Send endpoint returns {success, sent, data_summary} as expected
Both endpoints properly enforce admin role with 403 for non-admin users
Digest HTML is well-formatted with CarryOn branding, sparkline, tier breakdown table
data-testid attributes properly added for preview-digest, send-digest, refresh-analytics buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Analytics Digest feature fully functional. Preview shows MRR ($0.00), Conversion (0%), Churn (0%), New Signups (20), User Funnel, and Tier Breakdown. Send Digest sends to 1 admin. Auto-scheduled to send alongside weekly digest on Mondays. All endpoints require admin role. App URL: https://ops-portal-overhaul.preview.emergentagent.com, Analytics tab: /admin/analytics

digest_html_sections: User Funnel (Active Trials, Active Subscribers, Expired, Churned)
